textByHash.029700e4f49666675637578b8f2a603591d33ef4: We? This foolish idea was yours alone.
textByHash.10f425d9b92888ebccf3ecb4bb82cd5721e990c9: We're blind here. My senses do nothing this close to the ritual marker.
textByHash.418cf383600e69b7368e6af2ef5d21df5d619c2a: A shadow? Could just be troll superstition.
textByHash.4481ee07e67d3f8b6f7f5d92b3ed61b8099bb566: That's enough! You've already shared too much.
textByHash.46b431608f36cf56b9bf014d5f3f94f291ca3cd6: We wouldn't have this problem if we were in the Shadow Realm!
textByHash.abd48dca2a6f4222311894fa4a5768b7cb1bbbc6: You're in no place to make demands!
textByHash.b2963ac0f090bcc8384b9379c8ececb3f24cb464: I doubt that. Trolls are as dumb as they come.
textByHash.b40af0a36ff430fe823ec67c7dbc5f3c040a65ab: Which is none of your business. Now, can we get to work?
textByHash.c191783f6094aa3201d22634fa546e6664cf8419: You've been told enough, human. Finish your questions and let us get back to work.
textByHash.ceee33bccf02ea843333aee5979b9210c0e91d59: Then let's keep it that way. This question has no relevance to our purpose here, Hazeel. It doesn't warrant an answer.
textByHash.d40d630b4f3b9b14bcba5d1e94846dc267134f87: Ha! They will have no interest in trolls.
